action_items.action: URGENT — GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign still Blocked (day 12). Ciara referenced the 'op list grid' in a DM at 10:00 today but no resolution communicated. Directly ask Ciara what is preventing sign-off and whether the Jira Blocked flag can be cleared today.

NEW — GDCU-8893 Gambling.com Design System moved to 'In Product' today (was 'In Progress' this morning). Highest priority ticket — Ciara delivered. Review and sign off: design system tokens, Figma Plugin DS Token Exporter, Claude knowledge files, and AI Tool Usage Guidelines. Ciara is also planning a wider announcement across gdc/core-product/language/pod/ai-chatter channels — confirm timing and messaging with her.

NEW — GDCU-8792 Cloudflare Bot Management still showing Blocked in QA with no visible progress or Slack discussion today. Chase Sanja Budic or QA lead for a status update — what is the QA blocker and is PM action required to unblock?

NEW — GDCU-8879 Genesis Brand Carousel Component Card (Jessica Dordevic) moved to 'In Product' at 11:40 today. Review Jess's Figma deliverable — Chloe's outstanding feedback was to confirm logo name/size in Figma and verify it was sourced from Origins. Confirm this is resolved before sign-off.

NEW — GDCU-8842 Integrate Genesis Content Layouts (Harden Thomas Wallace) moved to 'In Product' at 12:54 today. Review: GDC site detecting Genesis-prefixed layout classes (25/75, 50/50, 75/25, auto), multi-layer nesting up to 3 levels, and mobile stack behaviour. Stakeholders include Gabriel Cornoiu and Chloe Christie.

NEW — GDCU-8866 Automation Bug Fixing & Refactoring Sprint 8 (Robin John) moved to 'In Product' at 13:29 today — the most recent ticket to land in your queue. Review automation suite bug fixes and code refactoring for Sprint 8 sign-off.

CARRY FORWARD — GDCU-8801 Oplist Redesign on CA/FR Casino Page (Ciara Carroll) still In Product after 12 days. Ciara mentioned in DM at 10:00 today that she is 'tackling some issues Harden has sent' and the op list grid is on her list — check if she needs your review to progress.

CARRY FORWARD — GDCU-8512 Always On Betting Tips Page (Miguel Migneco) still In Product since 2026-04-23. No updates today. Review mobile-first Betting Tips Hub designs — tip card components, sport navigation, Matrix widget integration, and operator offers module.

NEW — GDCU-8546 Tinder Style Offer Match (Jessica Dordevic) moved to 'In Product' today. Jess sent updated Figma yesterday (Mike left comments, confirmed happy). This is now formally awaiting Mike's In Product sign-off — check Figma is complete and approve the ticket.

NEW — GDCU-8871 🔥 Free to Play App POC v2 (Carlos Blauth) In Product as of 09:21 today — not flagged in the morning report. Review POC v2 changes: Cosmo Spins card height increase, in-carousel offer tiles, popup banner relocation to game details screen, and sticky bottom nav. Stakeholders: Gabriel Cornoiu, Dean Ryan, Chloe Christie.

NEW — Chloe Christie shared bad UX examples in DM today: multiple news/odds pages with broken game embeds, malformed HTML affecting site container, and poorly formatted tables (e.g. gambling.com/uk/news/next-celtic-manager-betting-odds, /next-barnsley-manager-odds, /next-tranmere-manager-odds). Assess if these require urgent product tickets or if editorial action is sufficient.

CARRY FORWARD — Confirm Gab's intake form questions are resolved: (1) should there be an 'Other' option in the offer ordering dropdown? (2) does 'new ordering structure required' mean a new OpList? Last message from Gab on this was 2026-04-23. No new public Slack activity today.

CARRY FORWARD — Confirm Chloe Christie's stakeholder intake form feedback is addressed: she asked for a schema sub-section under the SEO field and a new page option with a dropdown for editable content blocks. No new messages on this today.

NEW — GDCU-8870 Investigate Performance Improvements for Page Timeouts (Nebojsa Stanic) is In Product — not in the morning report. Pages timing out at 28s during MrCurl testing (US casino, poker, sportsbook pages). Review Nebojsa's findings: either verified page load improvements or a blocker report requiring assistance from other teams.

PDMT call removed from Ciara's calendar — Mike confirmed Wednesday sync is now the design team sync. Communicate this change formally to all affected parties (Miguel, Jessica, other attendees) so no one misses the repurposed slot.

Vic Dadson still on sick leave — signed off for a fortnight from ~2026-04-21, expected back ~2026-05-05. No messages from Vic since 2026-04-21. Ensure HR/Bob has been notified (Vic said she would), and consider temporary coverage for any unblocked analytics work.

CARRY FORWARD — GDCU-8903 Sports Quiz Hub (Backlog): UX pre-requisite ticket still not created. Ticket states 'The UX ticket (design handoff) must be completed and approved before this ticket is actioned.' Create the UX pre-req or formally validate scope with Chloe and Gab before sprint planning.
NOTE — GDCU-8915 Add GEO Selector to Card Carousel Shortcode (Nebojsa Stanic) completed today. No action needed, noting for sprint progress awareness.
